headline: Boston Dynamics tries using ‘robot dogs’ for deliveries
summary: Boston Dynamics is testing its Spot robot dog for package deliveries. Spot uses a new conveyor belt accessory to carry and unload packages autonomously. The initiative aims to reduce human involvement in last-mile delivery.

headline: Sony delays its new PS5 fight stick
summary: Sony has postponed the launch of its FlexStrike fight stick controller for PS5 and PC. The delay is attributed to “unexpected production delays.” No new release date has been specified for the controller.

headline: Nomad’s high-end phone accessories are up to 30 percent off
summary: Premium phone accessory maker Nomad is holding an anniversary sale. Customers can get up to 30% off its entire catalog of products. The sale runs through July 20th and includes deals on items like the Leather Mag Wallet.

headline: The OLED Xbox Ally X20 is so good, Asus will sell it solo
summary: Asus will sell its OLED Xbox Ally X20 handheld console as a standalone device. It was initially planned to be bundled exclusively with expensive AR glasses. This decision comes after positive reception for the handheld.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced's Controversial Day 1 DLC Earned $1 Million, Just on Steam
summary: Ubisoft's Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced day one DLC generated $1 million on Steam. The $85 collection proved controversial among players. Despite criticism, the DLC achieved significant sales figures.

headline: Backrooms Lands on Digital After Becoming A24's Highest-Grossing Movie of All Time
summary: Kane Parsons' directorial debut, Backrooms, is now available for home viewing. The film recently became A24's highest-grossing movie ever. Its digital release follows a successful theatrical run.

headline: Amazon's Audible Prime Day Deal Ends in 2 Days: Pay Just $1 Per Month and Get $20 in Audible Credit
summary: Audible's Prime Day deal offers a subscription for just $1 per month. Subscribers also receive $20 in Audible credit with the promotion. This limited-time offer is set to expire in two days.

headline: Danny Trejo Becomes a Comic Book Action Hero in Year of the Devil | SDCC 2026
summary: Danny Trejo is launching a new comic book series titled "Year of the Devil." He will promote the series at SDCC 2026, where fans can meet the legendary actor. Trejo transitions into a comic book action hero role.

headline: UK wasted £10bn on PPE that left NHS staff poorly protected, Covid inquiry finds
summary: A Covid inquiry found the UK wasted £10 billion on inadequate PPE. NHS staff were left poorly protected despite the massive spending. The report highlights failures in safeguarding healthcare workers from infections.

headline: Scott Mills was highest-paid BBC star before sacking
summary: Former Radio 2 host Scott Mills was revealed as the BBC's highest-paid star. He earned approximately £745,000 in the last financial year. His earnings were disclosed prior to his departure from the BBC.

headline: Wildfires burn in parts of UK as fire chiefs warn of extreme pressure
summary: Wildfires are actively burning across various parts of the UK. Fire chiefs have declared major incidents in North Wales and Derbyshire. Authorities warn of extreme pressure on emergency services due to the fires.

headline: Tyrannosaurus rex most expensive dinosaur ever sold
summary: A Tyrannosaurus rex skeleton was sold for a record price. The 67-million-year-old dinosaur was auctioned by Sotheby's in New York. It now holds the title for the most expensive dinosaur ever sold.
